title: CreateQuestionRequest
description: Request body for creating a new question in the Tettra knowledge base.

api_key.description: Your Tettra API key. This determines the asker of the question.

details.description: Additional details about the question, formatted as HTML.

category_id.description: Category identifier for organizing the question.

subcategory_id.description: Subcategory identifier. If provided, must belong to the specified category_id.

assignees.description: Array of user IDs to assign the question to.
